data.template:
<!doctype html>
                
                    

                        
                        
                        Fantasy Game | 
                        
                        
                            var odoo = 
                            {
                                csrf_token: '',
                                user:{
                                        id: ,
                                        partner_id: ,
                                        name: '',
                                        
                                    },
                                    company:{
                                            id: ,
                                            name: '',
                                            country_id: ,
                                            country_name: '',
                                            currency_id: ,
                                            currency_name: '',
                                            country_list: JSON.parse(),
                                            
                                            
                                    },
                            
                                    debug: '',
                            };
                            odoo.__session_info__ = {};
                            odoo.__session_info__.name = '';
                            odoo.__session_info__.partner_id = '';
                            if (!/(^|;\s)tz=/.test(document.cookie)) {
                                const userTZ = Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone;
                                document.cookie = `tz=${userTZ}; path=/`;
                            }
                            window.TRANSLATIONS = {};
